name: io.github.hackmods/cursor-proxmox-mcp
title: Cursor Proxmox MCP
description: Manage Proxmox VE via Cursor: QEMU, LXC, storage, HA, firewall, access.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to Proxmox MCP config.json (host, token, SSL).

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_TOKEN_VALUE
environmentVariables.description: API token secret when config uses ${PROXMOX_TOKEN_VALUE}.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_MCP_VERBOSE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for verbose tool_call detail (also bumps INFO→DEBUG).

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to config.json inside the container (default /config/config.json).
